positive: A stylized, minimalist depiction of a nocturnal woodland scene. The main subject is a geometric owl sitting on a branch, surrounded by abstract, bioluminescent flora and ferns. Use a limited color palette dominated by deep indigo, teal, emerald green, and warm gold accents. The style should be modern flat vector art combined with the aesthetic of intricate line-work engraving. The composition must be highly symmetrical and centrally focused for optimal apparel placement, featuring clean silhouettes and strong negative space. Include stylized crescent moons and abstract constellations as background elements. Highly detailed, crisp edges, perfect symmetry, suitable for direct screen printing.
negative: low resolution, blurry, artifacts, bad anatomy, extra limbs, text, signature, watermark, cropped, noise, busy background, photorealism, gradient, messy, dirty
